title: Add shared compile-cache sweep helper and exploratory byte260 evidence
author: divyaprakash0426

data.description: Shared compile-cache sweep helper that propagates TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR and TRITON_CACHE_DIR into each torchrun subprocess
Byte260-only tokenizer rebuild path that avoids unnecessary SentencePiece work
Included exploratory remote H100 RunPod execution log for cache population, export, and end-to-end validation

novel_contributions: Added a cluster sweep helper that shares compile caches across torchrun subprocesses
Added a byte260-only tokenizer spec to reduce rebuild overhead
Included the exact train_gpt.py snapshot used for the exploratory setup
Included the remote H100 exploratory log directly in the PR for reproducibility
Documented a temporary lossy sp1024 -> byte260 staging path for exploratory validation
